# Competitor Analysis: GoOffGrid vs Screen Time / Digital Detox Apps
Generated: 2026-04-03

## Summary

The screen time / digital detox market has ~15 significant players but NO app combines social competition + screen time tracking + gamification + city rankings + breathing exercises + O2 points the way GoOffGrid does. The 10M+ download giants (Forest, StayFree, Google Family Link, AppBlock) have zero or minimal social features. This is the biggest opportunity.

---

## TIER 1: 10M+ Downloads (Major Competitors)

### 1. Forest: Focus for Productivity
- Developer: Seekrtech (Taiwan)
- Downloads: ~50M+ (Google Play), 4M+ paying users
- Rating: 4.5 stars
- Key Features: Plant virtual trees during focus, trees die if you leave, real tree planting partnership, Plant Together with friends, whitelist apps, statistics
- Monetization: Free Android (ads) / $1.99 Pro Android / $3.99 iOS one-time / New Plus subscription
- Revenue: ~$100K/month
- Unique: Tree-growing metaphor, real trees planted (2M+)
- They have, GoOffGrid doesnt: Real tree planting, established brand (10+ years), massive user base
- GoOffGrid has, they dont: Social competition/duels, city/country rankings, stories, breathing exercises, O2 points economy

### 2. StayFree - Screen Time
- Developer: ST Pulse (Sensor Tower)
- Downloads: 10M-17M (Google Play)
- Rating: 4.6 stars (260K ratings)
- Key Features: Cross-device tracking (phone+desktop+browser), app usage stats, blocking, overuse reminders, shorts blocker
- Monetization: Free with ads / Premium subscription
- Unique: Cross-platform (Win/Mac/Linux/Chrome/Firefox/Safari), granular social media blocking
- They have, GoOffGrid doesnt: Cross-device tracking, desktop+browser extensions
- GoOffGrid has, they dont: Social competition, duels, city rankings, stories, breathing, O2 points, gamification

### 3. Google Family Link
- Developer: Google
- Downloads: 170M+ (Google Play)
- Rating: 3.5 stars
- Key Features: Parental controls, screen time limits, app approval, location tracking, content filters
- Monetization: 100% Free
- Note: Different target audience (parents managing children)

### 4. AppBlock
- Developer: MobileSoft (Czech Republic)
- Downloads: 8.5-10M+ (Google Play)
- Rating: 4.7 stars (200K ratings)
- Key Features: App/website blocking, schedules, location-based triggers, Wi-Fi triggers, Strict Mode (unbypassable)
- Monetization: Free / Premium $4.99/month or $29.99/year
- Unique: Location/Wi-Fi-based auto-blocking, Strict Mode

---

## TIER 2: 1M-10M Downloads

### 5. Opal - CLOSEST SOCIAL COMPETITOR
- Developer: Opal (USA), VC-backed $6.9M
- Downloads: est. 5-8M total
- Revenue: $10M ARR, ~$400K/month
- Rating: 4.6 stars
- Key Features: AI insights, blocking, focus sessions, friend leaderboard challenges
- Monetization: ~$9.99/month or $59.99/year
- Unique: #1 App Store, AI coaching, friend leaderboard
- GoOffGrid has, they dont: City/country rankings, duels, stories, breathing, O2 points

### 6. ActionDash (5M+ downloads, Sensor Tower)
### 7. YourHour (4-5M+, floating timer overlay, addiction scoring)
### 8. Habitica (5-8M, RPG gamification for habits, not screen time specific)
### 9. Freedom (3.5M users, cross-device sync blocking, $1.2M/yr revenue)
### 10. Flora (3M+ users, friend accountability - friends tree dies if YOU fail)

---

## TIER 3: Emerging Social Competitors (Small but relevant)

### 11. one sec - scientifically validated (Max Planck, 57% reduction)
### 12. ScreenTime Bet - weekly challenges with friends, real-time leaderboard
### 13. Flipd - social study timer with live sessions (1.6M downloads)
### 14. UseLess (MWM) - weekly leaderboards, Walk of Shame
### 15. SPACE - phone addiction tracker (1.6M downloads)

## FEATURE COMPARISON MATRIX

| Feature              | Forest | StayFree | Opal | AppBlock | YourHour | GoOffGrid |
|----------------------|--------|----------|------|----------|----------|-----------|
| Screen Time Tracking | Basic  | 5/5      | 4/5  | 3/5      | 4/5      | 4/5       |
| App Blocking         | Basic  | 4/5      | 4/5  | 5/5      | 3/5      | 3/5       |
| Friend Competition   | Minimal| No       | Some | No       | No       | 5/5       |
| Duels                | No     | No       | No   | No       | No       | 5/5       |
| City/Country Ranks   | No     | No       | No   | No       | No       | 5/5       |
| Stories              | No     | No       | No   | No       | No       | 5/5       |
| Breathing Exercises  | No     | No       | No   | No       | No       | 5/5       |
| Points Economy       | No     | No       | No   | No       | No       | 5/5       |
| Gamification         | Trees  | No       | No   | No       | Badges   | 5/5       |
| Cross-Device         | No     | 5/5      | No   | No       | No       | No        |
| AI Insights          | No     | No       | 4/5  | No       | No       | No        |
| Real Tree Planting   | 5/5    | No       | No   | No       | No       | No        |

---

## KEY INSIGHTS

1. MASSIVE WHITESPACE: No 10M+ app has real social competition. GoOffGrid #1 differentiator.
2. City/Country Rankings = UNIQUE. Zero competitors. Viral mechanic potential.
3. O2 Points Economy = UNIQUE. No competitor has internal points economy.
4. Stories = UNIQUE. No screen time app has stories.
5. Breathing Exercises = RARE. Only one sec has breathing (as pre-open nudge).

## MONETIZATION BENCHMARKS
- Free+Ads: StayFree, YourHour
- One-time: Forest ($1.99-$3.99)
- Subscription: Opal ($59.99/yr, $10M ARR), AppBlock ($29.99/yr), Freedom ($40/yr)

## FEATURES TO CONSIDER ADDING
- Cross-device tracking (StayFree killer feature)
- Real-world impact like tree planting (emotional hook)
- AI insights/coaching (trending, Opal differentiator)
- Strict Mode / Unbypassable blocking (AppBlock)
- Floating timer overlay (YourHour)
- Scientific validation study (one sec Max Planck study = massive press)

## GOOFFGRID MOAT
Social competition + duels + city rankings + stories + breathing + O2 points = NO COMPETITOR HAS THIS COMBINATION. Positioning = "Strava for screen time reduction"
